allow: PowerShell($gh = "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"; if \(Test-Path $gh\) { & $gh --version; "PATH_OK: $gh" } else { "not at default path"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })

PowerShell("=== GitHub Desktop default clone folder ==="; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\Documents\\GitHub" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, FullName; "=== git global config ==="; git config --global --get-all credential.helper; git config --global user.name; git config --global user.email; "=== Windows Credential Manager \(github\) ==="; cmdkey /list | Select-String -Pattern "github" -SimpleMatch)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Move Anthropic key to server-side Vercel function \(api/chat\) *)
